title: Increased Wind Charge Cooldown
description: Increases the Wind Charge Cooldown to 3 Seconds
body:
This simple datapack changes the Wind Charge cooldown to 3 seconds. This is useful in PVP scenarios to avoid people spamming the mace, or being able to escape any hole without thinking.


![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ku3FbuF5/images/c6d116bdf63cf06e7fd25a31c3bc70225a31d79c.gif)


**Only Works in 1.21.2 or above, due to usage of item components which was added then, so I can't backport it either.**

Report any bugs or issues in my discord.
